_README: SITE CONTENT MANAGEMENT FILE — Edit values below to update the website. Save this file, and changes will appear on page reload.

hero.title: Digital Product Designerrrrrr
hero.subtitle: Crafting immersive digital experiences that captivate, convert, and inspire. I transform complex problems into elegant solutions, bitch!

bio: I'm a senior digital product designer with over 8 years of experience crafting digital experiences that matter. My approach combines strategic thinking with pixel-perfect execution, ensuring every design decision serves both user needs and business goals.

I believe great design is invisible — it simply works. My process is rooted in empathy, validated by research, and refined through iteration. I've had the privilege of working with startups and Fortune 500 companies alike, helping them transform complex challenges into intuitive solutions.

quote.text: Design is not just what it looks like and feels like. Design is how it works.
quote.author: Steve Jobs

experience.description: Leading design for enterprise SaaS products, managing a team of 4 designers.
Designed mobile and web experiences for Fortune 500 clients.
Built design systems and user interfaces from the ground up.

projects.description: A curated collection of work that showcases my approach to solving complex design challenges.

items.title: Fintech Dashboard Redesign
items.description: Transforming complex financial data into intuitive visualizations for better decision making.

items.title: E-commerce Experience
items.description: Crafting a seamless shopping journey that converts visitors into loyal customers.

items.title: Healthcare App
items.description: Simplifying patient care through thoughtful design and intuitive interactions.

items.title: SaaS Platform
items.description: Building scalable design systems for enterprise-level software solutions.

caseStudies.description: Deep dives into my most impactful projects, from discovery to delivery.
